name: writer
description: Writing-focused agent for technical content, blogging, and documentation — accuracy first, honest voice, learns your style
author: meetsoma
notes: correction-capture and detection-triggers help the agent learn your writing preferences over time. Higher muscle budget (4000 tokens) because writers benefit from loaded context. precision-edit starts hot — writers need exact control over text changes. doc-hygiene keeps drafts and plans from rotting.
